content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "AI-powered suggestions", "built-in ad blocker", and "works fully offline", but ContentView.swift (App/ContentView.swift:1-20) shows only a plain local array-backed to-do list with no ML/AI frameworks (no CoreML/CreateML import), no content-blocking/ad-block APIs, and no explicit offline/network/persistence handling to substantiate the claim.

Pierre: Apple's App Review routinely rejects apps whose marketing copy promises features (AI, ad-blocking) that aren't actually implemented, since this is misleading to users under 2.1/2.3. Here the entire app is a 20-line in-memory task list with none of the described AI, ad-blocking, or offline-sync logic. Either implement these features or rewrite the description to match what the app truly does.
